programs.title: Hit-And-Miss Tour
programs.desc: With high expectations, the Dokbakz arrive in Australia, where nature and art coexist. After landing at Sydney Airport, they are eager to explore one of the city's most famous landmarks: the Opera House.

programs.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programs.desc: When Michael, an older single man looking for companionship, falls for alluring psychic Janis, she sees him as an easy mark. But will Janis be exposed by Virginia, Michael's concerned relative.

programs.title: Zombie House Flipping
programs.desc: Derek gets a new property for $.50 on the dollar, which makes him confident that nothing could possibly go wrong. But when they face the worst rat and roach infestation, their hopes quickly turn to fears.

programs.title: Rachael Ray's Meals In Minutes
programs.desc: Rachael loves Armenian food and shows how to prepare a traditional Armenian Easter feast of stuffed cabbage rolls, baked rainbow trout and sweet and savoury glazed fruit and potatoes.

programs.title: Jake Makes It Easy
programs.sub_title: Schnitzel Sandwich Celery Root Remoulade & Chocolate Chip Cookie Brittle
programs.desc: Taking inspiration from one of his husband's favourite dishes as a child, Jake makes celery-root remoulade and adds a European twist to the fried chicken sandwich.

programs.title: Rachael Ray In Tuscany
programs.desc: Rachael prepares her take on ribollita, a traditional Italian soup loaded with beans, greens, and mushrooms, served with toasted Tuscan bread.
